examples: We didn't note IGF mRNA expression in the lambdoidal suture at all time points.
The utility model discloses a profile, which is characterized in that the profile is composed of three edges with lambdoidal cross section.
The two lambdoidal foldable supports are arranged in parallel, and the photo frames are arranged on the supporting legs of the two lambdoidal foldable supports which are located on the same side.
